text.content:
A character with Cook's Utensils (or Brewer's Supplies / Herbalism Kit) and the matching tool proficiency can cook during a rest. Cooking takes that character's activity slot for the night.

How it works

  1. Pick a recipe in the recipe browser.
  2. Choose Standard (base DC) or Ambitious (DC +5, better output on success).
  3. Roll a Survival check against the recipe's DC. Ingredients are spent regardless of the result.

Party meals

Some recipes feed and buff the whole party from a single crafted item. The recipe browser marks them with a party icon and shows the live ingredient cost for the current party size, so you do not need to do the maths.

Well Fed

Eating a cooked meal grants Well Fed: temporary hit points scaling with the cook's proficiency bonus. Ambitious successes step the die size up.

Custom recipes and the content-pack authoring schema live on the module wiki.
